life-os.short: The personal navigation ecosystem. Five tools for seeing where you are across all of life and moving from that clarity.

nextus.short: The civilisational coordination platform. A map of what humanity is working on across seven domains — and infrastructure for building toward a shared horizon.

foundation.short: The nervous system entry point. A guided audio practice for regulation — the internal floor from which honest self-assessment becomes possible.

orienteering.short: The conversational front door to Life OS. A short exchange that figures out where you are and points you toward what might genuinely help.

purpose-piece.short: The contribution archetype tool. Surfaces the natural role you're built to play — the archetype, the domain, the scale at which your effort compounds most.

pulse.short: The recurring rhythm tool. Daily check-in, weekly reflection, quarterly reset. Works at any stage — no prerequisites.

horizon-leap.short: The full transformation programme. Facilitated by Nik. For people who keep hitting the same ceiling — identity-level work, not more tools.

horizon-goals.short: A living picture of what 10/10 looks like in a given domain. A directional picture of flourishing that guides navigation.

horizon-self.short: The version of you already living your Horizon Goals. A coherent identity to orient toward. Introduced inside Horizon Leap.

tea.short: Thoughts · Energy · Actions. The three lenses of the Pulse daily check-in.

fractal-principle.short: The same developmental physics that shape a single life also shape a civilisation. Life OS and NextUs use the same architecture at different scales — by design.

overview-effect.short: What astronauts report when they first see Earth from space — an irreversible recognition of the whole. The vantage point NextUs is built from.

contribution-archetype.short: The natural role you're built to play in any group, team, or system. One of nine patterns — each a distinct way of moving through the world.

steward.short: Tends systems, ensures they remain whole. Maintains, repairs, sustains. Patient with operational work.

maker.short: Builds what doesn't exist. Concept to creation. Comfortable with iteration. Values function over perfection.

architect.short: Designs the structural conditions that determine what can be built at all. Doesn't build the thing — designs the container the thing lives inside.

connector.short: Weaves relationships, creates networks. Sees who needs who. Facilitates without dominating.

guardian.short: Protects what matters, holds boundaries. Recognises threats early. Fierce protecting, gentle tending.

explorer.short: Ventures into unknown territory, brings back what's needed. Comfortable with uncertainty.

sage.short: Holds wisdom, offers perspective that clarifies. Sees patterns across time. Values understanding over action.

mirror.short: Contributes by reflecting what is true — about human experience, the interior life, the living world — in ways others can finally see and receive. Makes the invisible visible.

exemplar.short: Contributes by being the example. Raises the standard of what is possible by embodying it fully — in public, under pressure, at the edge of human capacity.

domain-human-being.short: Personal development, consciousness, inner work, transformation. The foundation of all collective life.

domain-society.short: Governance, culture, community, social structures. The architecture of how we live together.

domain-nature.short: Environment, ecology, planetary health, regeneration. The living systems that all life depends on.

domain-technology.short: Tools, infrastructure, innovation, digital and physical systems. The tools we build and the futures they make possible.

domain-finance-economy.short: Resources, exchange, wealth, value creation and distribution. The flows that determine what gets built and who benefits.

domain-legacy.short: Long-term thinking, intergenerational work, preservation, deep time. What we inherit, what we steward, what we leave behind.

domain-vision.short: Future imagination, possibility, coordination, collective direction. The orienting capacity of civilisation itself.

life-os-path.short: Your contribution, calling, and the work you're here to do. Not your job title — the through-line of meaningful contribution beneath whatever you're currently doing.

life-os-spark.short: The animating fire — aliveness, joy, play, and the godspark. When Spark is low, everything else runs on fumes.

life-os-body.short: Physical health, energy, and embodied experience. The vessel through which everything else operates.

life-os-finances.short: Your relationship with resources — whether money flows with intention or anxiety, whether decisions come from sufficiency or scarcity.

life-os-relationships.short: Intimacy, friendship, community, and belonging. The quality of connection, not just its presence.

life-os-inner-game.short: Your internal world — mindset, beliefs, emotional patterns, and the quality of your relationship with yourself.

life-os-outer-game.short: How you show up in the world — habits, systems, environment, and the structures that support or hinder your life.

scale-home.short: The immediate household scale. The people and environment you live with directly.

scale-neighbourhood.short: The local community scale. Close, immediate, relational. Face-to-face impact.

scale-city.short: The municipal scale. Urban systems, local governance, community infrastructure.

scale-province-state.short: The regional scale. Multi-community coordination within a defined territory.

scale-country.short: The national scale. Cross-regional systems, national policy, cultural identity.

scale-continent.short: The international scale. Cross-border coordination, regional civilisational patterns.

scale-global.short: The planetary scale. Species-level challenges and opportunities. The longest timelines.
